steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best describes the overall structure of the passage. Trace what the passage does in order: (1) defines community science, (2) lists three concrete benefits, (3) gives a real example (Merrill's butterfly study).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Reverses or misorders the sequence of the passage. ✗
  • Choice B: Invents an element not present in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C: Mislabels what the passage actually does at one or more stages. ✗
  • Choice D — 'identifies an approach, lists benefits, mentions a study': Matches the passage's three-part progression exactly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
